description: A classic appetizer made by halving hard-boiled eggs and filling the yolks with a seasoned mixture, commonly mayonnaise and mustard. They are typically served chilled at parties, picnics, and holiday meals.
preparation_steps: Hard-boil the eggs and cool them before peeling.
Halve the eggs and remove the yolks.
Mash the yolks with mayonnaise, mustard, and seasonings until smooth.
Pipe or spoon the filling back into the egg whites.

health_advice.benefits: Provides protein and can be satisfying in small portions.
health_advice.risks: May be high in fat or sodium depending on the amount of mayonnaise, salt, and toppings used.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use a lighter amount of mayonnaise or mix in Greek yogurt for a slightly lighter filling.

dietary_notes.note: Typically vegetarian and gluten-free, but recipes vary by add-ins and condiments.

allergens: Possible soy or egg in mayonnaise
